# MultiRoundTrip.IsMrtrParticipatingMethod method

Returns `true` when *method* is one of the three MRTR-participating methods (R-11.6-a).

```csharp
public static bool IsMrtrParticipatingMethod(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The request method name. |

## Return Value

`true` when participating.
